description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden storage box with a simple, utilitarian design. The box is constructed from thick, horizontal wooden planks, reinforced with additional wooden slats along the top and bottom edges for extra durability. The top surface is flat and bordered by two raised wooden strips, suggesting it may serve as a lid or cover. The sides are solid, with no visible openings, handles, or decorative features, emphasizing its practical function. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, giving it a matte, natural brown appearance. This type of box is commonly used for storage or transport of goods in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or backyards.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with reinforced edges and a flat, plank-style lid. The box has a plain, utilitarian look with a matte brown finish.
description_view_0: The box is seen from the side, showing three wide horizontal planks and two thick reinforcing slats on the top edges.
description_view_1: The end view reveals vertical planks forming the side, with additional horizontal slats at the top and bottom for reinforcement.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view displays the flat top and horizontal plank construction, with the reinforcing slats clearly visible.
description_view_3: This end view mirrors view 1, showing the vertical planks and horizontal reinforcement, with no visible handles or openings.
